title.en: Of course, this is thanks to Ye Tian's contribu...

content.en:
In the following years, Ye Tian kept a very low profile and went all out to comprehend and cultivate.

After Xiao Yue and Ye Yu were reincarnated and recultivated, they also reached the realm of True Monarch one after another.

At the same time, a large number of half-step True Ancestors were born one after another in the entire Quasi-Dao Realm, and even the Human Race had reached dozens of half-step True Ancestors.

Of course, this is thanks to Ye Tian's contribution to the human race.

Ye Tian now has too many resources, more than the resources of many Dao Ancestors, and throwing out a little resource is enough for the human race to cultivate a large number of half-step True Ancestors.

If it weren't for the restrictions of the Quasi-Dao Realm, the human race would probably be able to give birth to a true ancestor.

In the blink of an eye, millions of years have passed.

During this period, a turmoil broke out in the Infinite Abyss, which was a war between the top major forces and the Imperial Beast Sect, and dozens of True Ancestor-level Abyss Lords of the Imperial Beast Sect appeared, slaughtering countless half-step True Ancestors and True Monarchs, causing heavy losses to all major forces.

But these dozens of True Ancestor-level fell and died one after another under the rules of the Quasi-Dao Realm, coupled with the damage of the half-step True Ancestor.

But the Infinite Abyss Fragment is still controlled by the Imperial Beast Sect in a part of the area, that area belongs to the forbidden land, and it is impossible to step into, and once you step into it, you will definitely die.

Some areas on the periphery are controlled by the top powers, but unfortunately there are not many treasures of the Dao, and they are of little value.

Gradually, the Infinite Abyss Fragment was no longer cared for.

After all, the major forces have suffered too heavy losses in the Infinite Abyss, and with the fact that more Abyss monsters are gradually born there, they can't hold it at all.

The benefits are not proportional to the losses, who will continue to send troops to the Infinite Abyss?

And just like that, the matter came to an end.

------------

"The fusion of soul and avenue is almost eighty percent, my soul and avenue are too powerful, far more than others I don't know how many times, it takes a long time to completely fuse!"

Ye Tian muttered.

But he also knew very well that he mainly spent a lot of time on cultivating Dao techniques.

Millions of years ago, he could only use two Dao techniques, one Void Splitting Technique, and one Spatial Escape.

And now, Ye Tian has become a five-door Taoist technique.

These five Dao techniques are the Defensive Dao Technique-Purple Gold True Body, the Blockade Dao Technique-Zhongtian Emperor Imperial Seal, the Attack Dao Technique-Ten Heavenly Hell Dragon, and the Ice Dao Technique-Blue Absolute Ice.

The cultivation of these five Dao techniques has greatly increased Ye Tian's strength, and his means have become richer, and there are almost no weaknesses.

Overall, Ye Tian's current strength was at least five times stronger than it was a million years ago.

"The Quasi-Dao Realm is growing all the time now, but even at this rate, it will take a long time for the Quasi-Dao Realm to transform into the Dao Realm, but as time passes, the True Ancestors may be able to enter the Quasi-Dao Realm by using secret techniques, and those True Ancestors who are sleeping in the domain realm may also wake up. At that time, the situation in the entire quasi-Dao realm will be complicated!"

Ye Tian sighed.

But he couldn't stop this change, so he could only continue to increase his strength to protect the human race, protect his relatives, and protect the Void Heaven Temple.

It's been another few years.

On this day, the incarnation of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor came.

"Master!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Apprentice, the time is almost up, although you haven't reached the half-step True Ancestor Extreme, you can also go to the Dark Forbidden Realm. The situation in the Quasi-Dao Realm changes very quickly, and I am worried that the time will drag on for a long time, and you will not have time to leave the Quasi-Dao Realm in the future. Now is at least a period of relaxation, just in time to leave, and it won't attract too much attention!" said the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor.

"Master, then let's go!" Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, Ye Tian tore through the barriers of the Quasi-Dao Realm and left the Quasi-Dao Realm.

As soon as he left the Quasi-Dao Realm, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor Body greeted Ye Tian and secretly took Ye Tian away, far away from chaos.

......

Ye Tian entered the chaos for the first time and felt the enormity of the chaos.

Compared to Chaos, even the Quasi-Dao Realm is not worth mentioning, as if it is a flat boat in the sea.

However, in the chaos, Ye Tian's speed can be accelerated to a very fast degree, and he can easily cross the space, and it is very convenient to hurry or something.

But Ye Tian still let the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor take him on the way, otherwise, with his cultivation, if he wants to go to that place of chance in the Dark Forbidden Domain, I'm afraid it will take a long time.

Ye Tian's Quasi-Dao Realm was actually not far from the Dark Forbidden Domain, but the place where the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor took Ye Tian was not in the same direction as the Dark Forbidden Domain here, but in another direction.

However, the Dark Forbidden is not suitable for haste, so it must be entered from the edge of the nearest Dark Forbidden Territory to ensure safety and speed.

In a flash, a month passed.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor took Ye Tian to a boundless dark area, originally chaos was relatively dark for ordinary people, but in the eyes of the half-step True Ancestor, it was no different from daylight.

But the area in front of me is really dark, this darkness seems to be above the rules, and I am afraid that even the rules of light cannot illuminate this area.

"This is the Dark Forbidden Realm!"

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor pointed to the dark area and said.

Approaching the Dark Forbidden Domain, Ye Tian felt the great terror in the underworld, as if an endless aura of fear poured into his body.

"It's hard to stay until you enter the Dark Forbidden Realm, and if you enter the Dark Forbidden Domain, it's even more terrifying!"

Ye Tian thought so.

"This is for you!" Void Heaven Dao Ancestor took out a black leaf and handed it to Ye Tian, "This is the Dark Dark Leaf, which can resist the invasion of the power of the Dark Forbidden Domain, otherwise even the True Ancestor will not be able to survive in the Dark Forbidden Domain, only the Dao Ancestor can barely survive, but he only dares to survive on the periphery." "

Ye Tian accepted the dark dark leaf and wore it on his body, and immediately felt much better.

"Remember, once you enter the Dark Forbidden Realm, no matter what sound you hear or what you see, don't touch it, otherwise it will be easy to encounter great horrors, and even being a teacher may not be able to protect you!"

Ye Tian nodded, indicating that he understood.

Soon, the two entered the Dark Forbidden Realm.

As soon as he entered the Dark Forbidden Domain, Ye Tian felt a terrifying force invade his body, but most of it was blocked by the Dark Dark Leaf, but the remaining power also made him extremely uncomfortable.

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor protected Ye Tian and constantly shuttled through the Dark Forbidden Domain, flying towards the unknown area.

Along the way, Ye Tian kept hearing all kinds of strange sounds, as if he could still see a vague shadow flying by his side, and he almost reminded the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor several times.

But as soon as he thought of the previous reminder of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, he couldn't help it.

Besides, there was really something, he could find it, how could the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor not find it?

"Is it an illusion? Or is it something special?"

Ye Tian was curious.

But his strength is too weak, this kind of thing is not something he can study, otherwise he won't know how to die!

The flight took three days.

At this time, Ye Tian was tormented, he had a lot of injuries on his body, and the most important thing was that his soul was impacted, and the influence in the dark made it difficult for him to calm down, as if he had been tortured endlessly.

"Master, the headquarters of the Forbidden Hall is located in the Dark Forbidden Domain, but the Dark Forbidden Domain is so terrifying, they still have True Monarch disciples, wouldn't they be dead if they go out?" Ye Tian couldn't help but ask.

After all, he is like this, and the disciples of the Forbidden Hall are probably even more unbearable, and the weak disciples will die if they go out!

The Void Heaven Dao Ancestor explained, "The alchemy of the Forbidden Hall has a weak effect of resisting the power of the Dark Forbidden Domain, and they generally don't go out. In addition, it is said that the headquarters of the Forbidden Hall is constantly far away from the realm, even if it is you, you will go out after flying for a few minutes, and the impact will not be great! If you are in a very deep position in the Dark Forbidden Domain, then it is purely a search for death!"

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

After a while, Ye Tian finally heard the sentence he had been expecting for a long time-

"It's here!"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said in a low voice.
